description: An outdoor photograph of a woman with long dark hair speaking into a microphone at a lectern that bears the Department of Homeland Security seal. She wears a red, white and blue plaid jacket, and several American flags stand behind her against a green hillside. Overlaid script and serif text at the top reads Congratulations on a historic year.
notable_text: Congratulations on a historic year; U.S. DEPARTMENT OF HOMELAND SECURITY
